textPlain: > While some have traced Wordle to Lingo, a game show that started in 1987, they’ve missed an earlier implementation: WORD was published in 101 Computer Games by Digital Equipment Corp. in 1973Which comes after the board game Mastermind, which was created in 1970 (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mastermind_(board_game))
you can play it here: https://troypress.com/wp-content/uploads/user/js-basic/index...The program is named "Word"
This is a case where the (2022) year thing really confuses!
DEC the company, not Dec the month. @dang
That and using Dec instead of DEC. Was having trouble parsing the title on this one.
Why did the programmer set up his Christmas tree on Halloween?Because OCT 31 == DEC 25
